name: Pack Of 12 – Bonnie Canned Cat Food Lamb In Gravy 400g
shortDescription: BONNIE Canned Cat Food Lamb in Gravy offers high-quality lamb protein, essential nutrients, and hydrating gravy to support muscle strength, digestion, and overall health in adult cats. A delicious, balanced wet food for daily nourishment.
description: Give your cat the nourishment they crave with BONNIE Canned Cat Food Lamb in Gravy a wholesome, protein-rich wet meal crafted specifically for adult cats. Each can is filled with tender lamb chunks soaked in a smooth, flavorful gravy that keeps even the pickiest eaters excited for mealtime. Formulated as a complete and balanced diet , this recipe delivers the ideal blend of high-quality lamb protein, essential vitamins, minerals, and taurine to support everyday vitality. The moisture-rich texture helps keep your cat hydrated, promoting better digestion, kidney function, and overall well-being. With its soft texture and aromatic gravy, Bonnie Lamb in Gravy offers superior palatability while providing the nutrients your feline companion needs for lean muscle maintenance , a healthy skin & glossy coat , and optimal immune and heart function . It’s the perfect daily meal for adult cats who deserve both delicious flavor and reliable nutrition. Key Benefits High-quality lamb protein supports muscle strength and sustained energy. Hydration-boosting moisture content promotes urinary tract and kidney health. Enriched with essential vitamins & minerals for immunity and overall vitality. Fortified with taurine , vital for healthy vision and heart function. Soft, gravy-rich texture enhances palatability for adult cats. Feeding Guide For a 4 kg adult cat: 1 full 400g can per meal , served 2–3 times daily depending on activity and breed. Serve at room temperature for enhanced aroma and digestibility. Always provide fresh, clean water.
